title: From Alcuin
content:
The sea is the road of the bold,
    Frontier of the wheat-sown plains,
    The pit wherein the streams are rolled
    And fountain of the rains.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "From Alcuin"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
